news.t: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace

holdings.infoBox: LOHA is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Airlines Holdings stock at 1.39%, Cummins at 1.37%, James Hardie Industries at 1.34%, Delta Air Lines at 1.32%, and Lennox International at 1.30%.

overview.description: The Roundhill HALO ETF (LOHA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of US-listed companies of various market capitalization identified to withstand threats of AI disruption. The fund uses fundamental screens to select 100 companies that score high in their fitness assessment. LOHA was launched on May 14, 2026 and is issued by Roundhill.
infoTable: Akros U.S. Heavy Assets Low Obsolescence Index

data.title: This ETF shatters records
data.text: Roundhill Investments CEO Dave Mazza discusses the record-breaking performance of the DRAM ETF and the A.I.-driven demand boosting memory stocks on 'Making Money.'

data.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
